issues.title: Check that metadata is being correctly generated when using PagePdfDocumentReader

comments.body:
Seems fixed by https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/commit/6753e242e8f9fa5dfc8ee239ba2add6c1c2b6855 so can we close this issue?

https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/pull/934 -> Enhance test about incorrect page number case

#934 is adding a test, and not changing any code.  The test is creating the metadata with the `page_number` explicitly and validating that it worked as expected.  What is reported in this issue looks to be a bug in `PagePdfDocumentReader`, so this issue should remain open.  Also, that sample app needs to be updated, I'll fix that.

issues.title: about how to import in IDEA
issues.body:
can not import using maven jar in IDEA
![1](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/assets/39054457/66b688ba-fef6-4c7f-bc52-1623bae4e84a)

comments.body:
@zrmzack, 
What do you want to do? Mind that 0.7.1-SNAPSHOT is very old and many breaking changes have happened since. 
If you are starting a new project you should use the latest [0.8.1-SNAPSHOT](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/0.8-SNAPSHOT/index.html) or at least the latest milestone release [0.8.0](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/index.html). 
Also check the [Add Milestone and Snapshot Repositories](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/0.8-SNAPSHOT/getting-started.html#repositories) to configure your repositories.

follow the suggestions about and the reference documentation. 
If you find any problems please reopen.

issues.title: Some links in Javadoc are invalid
issues.body:
Because fully qualified names were not used and only class names were used, some links in Javadoc became invalid

![image](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/assets/35491928/269ee1b8-a1f2-46a1-9b97-08b68dc732b4)

This will lead to errors in generating Javadoc pages in the future. Do we have tools to check and resolve this issue during compilation

comments.body: @laglangyue do you still experience this issue? I couldn't reproduce it from my IDE.

This renders ok, though I'm sure we have javadoc errors to prune.  Closing the issue

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/1dd2b794-60c4-45a2-825a-31c893c70adf)
